# Permission snapshot — @substrat-run/demo-bike-shop

16 keys · 4 modules · 2 roles

## 1. Registry — every key a registered manifest declares

| Key | Description | Declared by |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `bike:manage` | Register and manage customers' bikes | `@substrat-run/demo-bike-shop` |
| `customer:manage` | Manage customers and the workshop price list | `@substrat-run/demo-bike-shop` |
| `invoicing:export` | Export a fakturaunderlag (makes it immutable) | `@substrat-run/engine-invoicing` |
| `invoicing:read` | Read fakturaunderlag | `@substrat-run/engine-invoicing` |
| `protocol:countersign` | Counter-sign an already-signed protocol — a second signature on the same frozen content (customer at pickup) | `@substrat-run/engine-protocol` |
| `protocol:create` | Define protocol templates and start protocol instances on entities | `@substrat-run/engine-protocol` |
| `protocol:fill` | Record responses on an open protocol (append-only) | `@substrat-run/engine-protocol` |
| `protocol:read` | Read protocol templates, instances, responses and signatures | `@substrat-run/engine-protocol` |
| `protocol:sign` | Sign a protocol — freezes it forever (separate from fill: the technician fills, the arbetsledare signs) | `@substrat-run/engine-protocol` |
| `protocol:void` | Void (supersede) a protocol — never deletes | `@substrat-run/engine-protocol` |
| `workorder:assign` | Assign a technician | `@substrat-run/engine-workorder` |
| `workorder:close` | Close a completed work order | `@substrat-run/engine-workorder` |
| `workorder:complete` | Complete a work order (with billable lines) | `@substrat-run/engine-workorder` |
| `workorder:create` | Create work orders | `@substrat-run/engine-workorder` |
| `workorder:read` | Read work orders, time and material | `@substrat-run/engine-workorder` |
| `workorder:report` | Start work, report time and material | `@substrat-run/engine-workorder` |

## 2. Roles — as defined by this vertical's provisioning code

Identical in every tenant. Per-tenant customisation is a runtime concern.

| Role | Permissions |
| --- | --- |
| `mechanic` | `protocol:fill`, `protocol:read`, `workorder:read`, `workorder:report` |
| `workshop-admin` | `bike:manage`, `customer:manage`, `invoicing:export`, `invoicing:read`, `protocol:create`, `protocol:fill`, `protocol:read`, `protocol:sign`, `protocol:void`, `workorder:assign`, `workorder:close`, `workorder:complete`, `workorder:create`, `workorder:read`, `workorder:report` |

## 3. Coverage — which roles hold each key

| Key | Held by |
| --- | --- |
| `bike:manage` | `workshop-admin` |
| `customer:manage` | `workshop-admin` |
| `invoicing:export` | `workshop-admin` |
| `invoicing:read` | `workshop-admin` |
| `protocol:countersign` | — no role — |
| `protocol:create` | `workshop-admin` |
| `protocol:fill` | `mechanic`, `workshop-admin` |
| `protocol:read` | `mechanic`, `workshop-admin` |
| `protocol:sign` | `workshop-admin` |
| `protocol:void` | `workshop-admin` |
| `workorder:assign` | `workshop-admin` |
| `workorder:close` | `workshop-admin` |
| `workorder:complete` | `workshop-admin` |
| `workorder:create` | `workshop-admin` |
| `workorder:read` | `mechanic`, `workshop-admin` |
| `workorder:report` | `mechanic`, `workshop-admin` |

## 4. Entity-narrowed grant shapes

Reachable WITHOUT a role, narrowed to one entity per principal. A key held by
no role in §3 but listed here is deliberate, not a gap.

| Entity type | Permissions granted per entity |
| --- | --- |
| `customer` | `protocol:countersign`, `protocol:read`, `workorder:read` |

## 5. Not covered by this artifact

- **The grants themselves** — per-principal, per-entity, minted at runtime with
  random ULIDs. Only their shapes above are representable deterministically.
- **Operator-defined roles** — roles created against a live deployment. This
  artifact covers provisioning code only.
